title: MADIA_732678_SCRIBA_Bonding images and protocol_01
author: Giulia Foschi

description:
ONLY METADATA 

 Collection of protocol and images on bonding procedure of: 

 
	 PDMS on several substrates (glass, silicon wafer, SU-8); 
	 a polystyrene transparent top layer on sensors substrate. 
 

 Data produced between from April 2017 to November 2017.
